text.title: FinOps for AI / ML Workloads Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on GPU/inference spend thresholds + checkpointing primitive availability.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: characterise-workload
step.action: Classify jobs as training/inference/batch; collect interruption history + repeat-input rate + latency SLOs.

step.name: draft-training-policy
step.action: Define spot policy + checkpoint interval + max interruption % per job class.

step.name: draft-inference-policy
step.action: Define caching keys/TTL + quantization gate + batching strategy per endpoint.

step.name: attribution-and-validate
step.action: Define per-run + per-request attribution tags; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
